title: SkillsAPI config
description: Schema for skills/*.yml files (and the legacy root skills.yml). Point your editor at this via a '# yaml-language-server: $schema=...' comment on the first line of the file - see USAGE.md.

statuses.description: Named, reusable status definitions, referenced by id from any file's skills via `type: status, status: <id>`. Optional - a status only used once can be defined inline where it's used instead.

skills.description: Every skill defined in this file, keyed by id.

status.description: A persistent, over-time definition (dash, frozen, or purely cosmetic) - same fields whether it's a named top-level entry (referenced by id from any skill) or an inline `type: status` block.

behavior.description: Java-side continuous logic. Omit entirely for a purely cosmetic status (on_start/on_tick/on_expire hooks only, no gameplay lock).

refreshable.description: Re-applying while already active restarts it.

on_start.description: Fires once when applied. Runs with the affected entity as both caster and sole target.

on_expire.description: Fires once when it ends (naturally, or removed early).

skill.description: One skill, keyed by id (the id used in /cast <id> and /skillsapi bind <id>).

targeter.description: Decides context.getTargets() for this skill's own top-level effects: only - nested lists (on_hit, on_start/on_tick/on_expire, sequence steps) get their own targets independently.

cast_time.description: Milliseconds. 0 (default) = resolves instantly, identical to calling Skill.cast() directly.

interruptible.description: Only matters if cast_time > 0 - can taking damage cancel the windup?

min_health_percent.description: Optional - caster must be at/above this fraction of max health, or the cast fails silently.

cost.description: Adds BOTH a condition (fails the cast if the caster doesn't have enough) and an effect that spends it (inserted first, so it's only ever spent on a cast that actually goes through).

type.description: Must match a key under resources.yml's resources: section.

telegraph.description: Optional looping particle/sound cue during a cast_time windup.

sound.description: Old enum-style Sound name (ENTITY_X_Y) - auto-converted to the modern registry key.

on_start.description: Fires ONCE, right when the windup begins - runs with targets = [caster] only.

effects.description: Required - what the skill actually does once it resolves.

effect.description: One thing that happens: damage, heal, a particle burst, a status, a traveling projectile, a custom shape, or a chained sequence of other effects. Every field below is optional except `type` - which ones matter depends on which `type` you pick; see USAGE.md's Effects section for the exact per-type field list.

amount.description: damage/heal: the amount. taunt: threat added (default 1000 - deliberately far above a single hit's damage-based threat, so a taunt reliably overrides it).

particle.description: particle/projectile effect only - any org.bukkit.Particle name. Optional on projectile (omit for an invisible one).

count.description: particle effect: default 10. summon effect: default 1 - how many mobs to spawn per cast.

color.description: 0-255 RGB. Only takes effect when particle/particle: DUST - silently ignored for every other particle type. (particle effect)

dust_size.description: particle effect only, DUST particle only.

effect.description: potion effect only - any org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType name, e.g. SLOWNESS, SPEED, STRENGTH.

duration_ticks.description: potion effect: default 100. status effect (inline definition): -1 = indefinite. summon effect: default -1 = lives until it dies or is dismissed; a positive value despawns it after that many ticks.

amplifier.description: potion effect only. 0 = potion level I.

status.description: status effect only - id of a definition under the top-level statuses: section. Mutually exclusive with `behavior` (that means an inline definition instead).

behavior.description: status effect only, inline definition. Presence of this field is what tells the parser 'this is inline', not a reference. Omit entirely for a purely cosmetic inline status.

tick_interval_ticks.description: status effect (inline) only - how often on_tick fires.

refreshable.description: status effect (inline) only - re-applying while already active restarts it.

on_start.description: status effect (inline) only - fires once when applied.

on_tick.description: status effect (inline) only - fires every tick_interval_ticks while active.

on_expire.description: status effect (inline) only - fires once when it ends.

hit_radius.description: projectile effect: default 1.0. shape effect: omit or 0 disables hit detection entirely.

pierce.description: projectile effect only - how many entities it can hit before stopping.

effects.description: projectile effect only (required) - fires on whatever it hits. Can nest anything, including another projectile/shape/status.

anchor.description: shape effect only. self/target follow their reference point every render tick; self_fixed/cursor/cursor_locked resolve once and hold still (aside from travel/offset/layer animation).

cursor_range.description: shape effect only, anchor: cursor/cursor_locked only.

interval_ticks.description: shape effect: how often it re-renders. telegraph: how often the loop fires.

offset.description: shape effect only - constant, local-space (right/up/forward relative to the caster's current facing) nudge from the anchor point, recomputed every tick.

travel.description: Makes a shape move forward over time like a thrown object, independent of anchor. Pair with anchor: self_fixed/cursor/cursor_locked, not self/target (those re-snap the center every tick and fight the travel velocity).

hit_area.description: shape effect only. points = sphere-test every rendered particle point. disk/sphere = test one flat disk or full sphere centered on the effect instead.

hit_height.description: shape effect only, hit_area: disk only - vertical tolerance above/below center.

hit_once.description: shape effect only - each entity can only trigger on_hit once over the whole effect's lifetime if true.

hit_interval_ticks.description: shape effect only - defaults to interval_ticks. Fully independent clock from rendering.

include_self.description: shape effect: can it hit the caster? radius targeter: does the caster count as a target?

visible_to.description: shape effect only. caster_only sends particles to just the caster - the hitbox itself is unaffected either way. Falls back to a normal broadcast if the caster isn't a Player.

disarm_after_hit.description: shape effect only - end the WHOLE effect (rendering and hit-scanning both) on its first hit instead of running full duration.

debug_hitbox.description: shape effect only - draws a red wireframe of the actual hit area. Always broadcasts to everyone regardless of visible_to - development aid, turn off before shipping.

debug_hitbox_points.description: shape effect only - density of the debug wireframe.

on_hit.description: shape effect only - fires against whatever it hits, with its own fresh SkillContext.

layers.description: shape effect only (required) - one or more independently-animated particle layers, stacked.

entity.description: summon effect only, required - any org.bukkit.entity.EntityType name, e.g. SKELETON, ZOMBIE, WOLF.

spawn_radius.description: summon effect only - spawned mobs are scattered within this many blocks of the caster, not stacked on top of them.

name.description: summon effect only - custom nameplate for spawned mobs. Omit for the entity type's default vanilla name (no nameplate).

health.description: summon effect only - overrides max health (and heals to full). Omit/0 to leave the entity type's own vanilla default.

main_hand.description: summon effect only - any org.bukkit.Material name to equip in the main hand. Omit for the entity type's vanilla default (often nothing).

helmet.description: summon effect only - any org.bukkit.Material name to equip as a helmet.

max_active.description: summon effect only - per-caster cap on concurrently active summons from this effect. 0 = uncapped.

on_cap_exceeded.description: summon effect only - what happens when max_active is already reached and this effect tries to spawn another.

aggro_radius.description: summon effect only - an idle summon (no current living target) targets the nearest hostile Monster within this many blocks. 0 disables auto-aggro entirely.

follow_radius.description: summon effect only - how far an idle summon can wander from its owner before pathing back.

move_speed.description: summon effect only - Pathfinder speed multiplier used when an idle summon walks back to its owner.

ai_interval_ticks.description: summon effect only - how often (in ticks) the follow/aggro check itself runs.

on_summon.description: summon effect only - fires once per spawned minion, targeting that minion (not the caster's own top-level targets).

shapeLayer.description: One independently-animated particle shape, stacked (with others) inside a `shape` effect's layers: list.

shape.description: Which fields matter depends on this. See USAGE.md's shape-types table for the full per-shape field list. Case-insensitive at runtime; lowercase is the project convention.

particle.description: Any org.bukkit.Particle name, e.g. FLAME, END_ROD, DUST, SOUL_FIRE_FLAME.

particle_count.description: Bukkit's per-call particle count, NOT the point count (that's `points`).

color.description: 0-255 RGB. Only takes effect when particle/particle: DUST - silently ignored for every other particle type. (shape layer)

points.description: Point/sample count - meaning depends on shape (ring/sphere point count, line/helix samples, parametric sample count along the curve, ...). box defaults to 96 instead of the generic 24 (see USAGE.md - 24 renders as 8 floating dots with no edges).

rings.description: CYLINDER (stacked ring levels, ignored if random_distribution: true), CONE (concentric arcs) only.

plane.description: RING only. vertical = facing-relative 'portal' ring; horizontal (default) = flat 'magic circle', not facing-relative.

y_offset.description: Static vertical shift applied to every point. Any shape.

random_distribution.description: CYLINDER, BOX only. true = scattered points (organic/rough look, generated once at config load) instead of the default clean grid/wireframe.

radius_jitter.description: CYLINDER only, 0-1. Only meaningful with random_distribution: true - randomizes each point's distance from center.

facing_relative.description: CYLINDER, HELIX, BOX, PARAMETRIC only. false = grounded/world orientation (default). true = beam orientation, long axis becomes local +z like LINE. No-op on every other shape type (LINE/ARC/CONE are always facing-relative; RING uses `plane` instead).

rotation.description: Constant base tilt in degrees (x/y/z), applied once - doesn't animate. Combine with the rotate_*_deg_per_sec fields for a shape that's both tilted and spinning.

rotate_deg_per_sec.description: Continuous spin around Y (yaw) - the original field.

scale_axis.description: Only matters if scale_start != scale_end. uniform = x/y/z together; radial = x/z only (radius); vertical = y only (height).

rise_per_sec.description: Constant-velocity vertical drift for the whole duration.

start_offset.description: Animated WORLD-SPACE translation of this layer's own center, lerped to end_offset over the effect's duration.

formula_x.description: PARAMETRIC only, required if shape: parametric. Math expression in t (0->1), i, n, pi, tau, e - see USAGE.md Custom curves section for the function list.

formula_y.description: PARAMETRIC only, required if shape: parametric.

formula_z.description: PARAMETRIC only, required if shape: parametric.

effects.description: Everything inside shares the same SkillContext the sequence itself was invoked with.

delay_ticks.description: Explicit override for the wait before the NEXT step fires. If omitted and this step contains a `shape` effect, defaults to that shape's own duration_ticks.

wait_for_shape_duration.description: Set false to skip the auto-detected shape-duration wait even if this step contains a shape (next step then fires with 0 delay).
